hero.title: Grow with the maker network.
hero.subtitle: Join 150+ vetted artisans, ateliers, and manufacturers across EU, IN, and AU — and connect to brands that are ready to produce.

sections.title: From application to first order.
sections.body: We keep the process lean so you can focus on what you do best — making. Apply once, get vetted, and start receiving work from brands that match your capabilities.

steps.title: Apply & get vetted
steps.body: Tell us about your workshop — equipment, capacity, materials, lead times. Our team reviews and verifies each application within 5 business days.

steps.title: Set your terms
steps.body: Define pricing per technique, minimum order quantities, lead times, and shipping regions. You stay in control of what you take on and at what price.

mockup.alt: Partner pricing and capability settings dashboard

steps.title: Receive work & deliver
steps.body: Brands route orders to your portal. You get task briefs, deadlines, and material specs — all on mobile via WhatsApp. Complete work, log output, and get paid.

mockup.alt: Production run progress in partner portal

steps.title: Get paid with international and local support
steps.body: Every completed order is tracked and reconciled. Withdraw earnings via local bank transfer or international wire, with dedicated partner support available on WhatsApp and email.

sections.title: Built for the people who make.
sections.body: The textile industry runs on trust. We give you the tools to prove your craft, connect with the right brands, and grow on your own terms.

benefits.title: Vetted brand network
benefits.body: Access brands actively looking for production partners — no cold outreach, no middlemen.

benefits.title: Mobile-first tools
benefits.body: Receive briefs, send updates, and manage orders from your phone. No desk requirement.

benefits.title: Transparent terms
benefits.body: Set your prices, lead times, and capacity. Brands come to you on your terms.

benefits.title: On-time payments
benefits.body: Every completed run is tracked and reconciled. Payments are processed on schedule, every time.

callout.title: Ready to join the network?
callout.body: Apply now and start receiving work from brands that value craft, provenance, and reliability.
